title: National Institute of Statistics and Census
summary:
National Institute of Statistics and Census (Spanish: Instituto Nacional de Estadística y Censos; Portuguese: Instituto Nacional de Estatistica e Censos) may refer to:

National Institute of Statistics and Census of Argentina
National Institute of Statistics and Census of Costa Rica
National Institute of Statistics and Census of Nicaragua
